chunks.title: Severe Gridlock at Sungai Besi Toll (July 2024)

chunks.title: DBKL: Jalan Sungai Besi Upgrade (Sept 2023 - Sept 2024)

chunks.title: Scheduled Road Works on Sungai Besi Highway (2024)
chunks.chunk_text: Besraya and LLM are conducting scheduled road maintenance on the Sungai Besi Highway from August 1 to December 31, 2024. Phased nightly lane closures (10PM-6AM) are expected to cause periodic disruptions.
